docs.name: Magnetic Text
docs.description: Per-letter cursor-tracking text effect. Every glyph leans toward the pointer under its own spring; linear falloff inside the configured radius, capped at the configured strength. Soft white glow fades in near the cursor. Wrapper carries an aria-label; per-glyph spans are aria-hidden so screen readers never spell the word out.

props.name: text
props.description: The text to animate. Each glyph becomes its own motion target.

props.name: as
props.description: Element tag to render as. Use "h1" / "h2" / "p" for semantic headings or paragraphs.

props.name: radius
props.description: Pixel radius around each letter within which the cursor exerts pull.

props.name: strength
props.description: Maximum displacement (px) any single letter can reach at peak proximity.

props.name: animateEntry
props.description: When true, letters stagger in with a spring on mount before becoming magnetic.

props.name: disableGlow
props.description: When true, the soft white glow that fades in around letters near the cursor is removed (useful on light backgrounds).

props.name: className
props.description: Extra Tailwind classes on the wrapping element (font-size, weight, color, etc.).

docs.overview: A general-purpose text-animation primitive. Use it for headlines, wordmarks, accent phrases, or any single string you want to feel reactive. Pairs well with `as="h1"`/`as="h2"` for SEO-correct headings.

scenarios.title: Pull-quote with strong magnetism
scenarios.description: Use a larger radius and strength on a slow editorial pull-quote — the effect reads as physical resonance rather than playful jitter.

scenarios.title: Wordmark with entry animation
scenarios.description: Stagger the letters in on mount, then let the cursor take over. `as="h1"` keeps it semantic.

scenarios.title: Light-mode usage
scenarios.description: On a light background the default white glow disappears anyway, but `disableGlow` removes the now-redundant text-shadow style entirely.

changes: Initial release: standalone per-letter cursor-tracking text component. Wraps any string with springs that lean toward the pointer; falloff is linear inside `radius`, zero outside; capped at `strength`. Optional `animateEntry` staggers letters in on mount. `as` prop lets it render as h1/h2/p/span. aria-label on the wrapper + aria-hidden on every glyph keep screen readers from spelling out the word.
